products.name: scbe-aethermoore
products.headline: The 14-layer governance engine for Node and Python.
products.audience: Developers who need the core SCBE scoring, harmonic wall, tokenizer, crypto, and governance exports.

products.name: scbe-aethermoore-cli
products.headline: The five-minute SCBE command line for GeoSeal agent safety demos, tokenizer lanes, governance packets, and checks.
products.audience: Humans and AI agents that need a terminal-first control surface over SCBE tools.

products.name: scbe-agent-bus
products.headline: A typed event bus for governed human and AI agent work.
products.audience: Teams and agent harnesses that need task packets, typed envelopes, and local/private routing.

products.name: scbe-bookforge
products.headline: Markdown to KDP-ready interiors, EPUB, cover-wrap proofs, and the BookForge Publishing Kit.
products.audience: Authors and small publishers who need repeatable Kindle, paperback, and hardcover package builds.
